name: Other Indigenous data, methodologies and global Indigenous studies
aliases: Indigenous data, methodologies and global Indigenous studies
notes: ANZSRC Division 45 context domain covering Indigenous data, data technologies, Indigenous methodologies, and global Indigenous studies. Source-specific research methods remain in groups 4501, 4511, and 4513; Māori data sovereignty remains in 4512. This context domain does not treat Indigenous methodologies as aliases of general Western research methods.
